column1: # GameCTL CS2 plugin catalog — every entry fetched from the plugin's OWN
# upstream release (never kus's bundle). Versions pin the set kus 8c8f89b1
# ships, i.e. a combination proven compatible with CS2 + CSS at build time.
#   name — plugin dir name used when the archive has no folder structure of
#          its own, and the name fetch.sh moves for the mode tier.
#   tier — metamod            : Source2 (C++) plugin, auto-loaded via its .vdf
#          metamod-ondemand   : Source2 plugin whose .vdf is stripped; the cfg
#                               so surf.cfg loads it then changelevels)
#                               loaded by the mode cfgs / GameModeManager)
# ORDER MATTERS: later entries overwrite earlier ones. GameModeManager's zip
# bundles its own copies of CS2-CustomVotes + WASD menu; the dedicated
# upstream entries come after it so they win.
